name: OpenClawing2 — Phase 3 Message Manager
description: Regression suite for pkg/nexus/agent MessageManager: compaction, digest bounds, pluggable tokenizer, stress + fuzz coverage.

metadata._llm_driven_reason: Vision-driven test suite per HelixQA Constitution §1 (Fully Autonomous LLM-Driven QA): prose actions are interpreted by the vision model. Article XI §11.5 exemption.
metadata.author: vasic-digital

test_cases.name: MessageManager applies defaults when config is zero
test_cases.expected_result: Defaults are safe for dev + production

test_cases.name: CreateStateMessages embeds task goal + elements + screenshot

steps.name: CreateStateMessages(state)
steps.expected: Content contains TASK_GOAL + element refs; Image attached when screenshot present

test_cases.expected_result: Every planner prompt carries full current-step context

test_cases.name: Compact folds digest + window under the token budget

steps.name: Seed 10 history steps with long evaluations, budget=50

test_cases.name: Under-budget Compact is a no-op
test_cases.expected_result: No spurious summariser calls when prompt already fits

test_cases.name: 500-step stress session stays under budget
test_cases.expected_result: Long sessions never exceed the configured budget

test_cases.name: Messages() emits system → digest → window → current order

steps.name: Messages(current)
steps.expected: First = RoleSystem; last = current RoleUser turn

test_cases.name: DefaultSummariser output capped at DefaultSummaryMaxBytes

steps.name: Summarise a batch with massive messages

test_cases.expected_result: Digest cannot grow unbounded even under pathological inputs

test_cases.name: ApproxTokenizer counts are proportional to length
test_cases.expected_result: Approx tokenizer is monotonic + non-zero for non-empty input

test_cases.name: Fuzz Compact never panics or loops forever

steps.name: go test -fuzz FuzzMessageManager_Compact
steps.expected: 3-second smoke run: no panics, bounded runtime per iteration

test_cases.expected_result: Compaction path resilient to adversarial inputs

test_cases.name: Benchmark tracks compaction cost per step

steps.name: go test -bench BenchmarkMessageManager_Compact
steps.expected: ns/op published so drift is visible across releases
